英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李
zh.Battle of Blore Heath, Staffordshire, En: 英國斯塔福爾希 希斯
zh.Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾達利 艾比
zh.Audley, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當James Touchet 5th Baron Audley於大約1398年出生在英國斯塔福爾奧德利時，他的父親Sir John Touchet Lord Audley28歲，母親Elizabeth de Stafford24歲。他於1414年2月24日與Margaret de Ros在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1408年登記服兵役。他去世於1459年9月23日在英國斯塔福爾希 希斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾達利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Touchet 5th Baron Audley于大约1398年出生在英国斯塔福爾奧德利时，他的父亲Sir John Touchet Lord Audley28岁，母亲Elizabeth de Stafford24岁。他于1414年2月24日与Margaret de Ros在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1408年登记服兵役。他去世于1459年9月23日在英国斯塔福爾希 希斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾達利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When James Touchet 5th Baron Audley was born about 1398, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth de Stafford, was 24. He married Margaret de Ros on 24 February 1414, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1408. He died on 23 September 1459, in High Heath, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Touchet 5th Baron Audley est né environ 1398, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Stafford, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Ros le 24 février 1414, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1408. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1459, à High Heath, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, England: Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als James Touchet 5th Baron Audley um 1398 in Audley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Touchet Lord Audley 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Stafford 24. Er hat am 24. Februar 1414 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1408 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 62 Jahren in High Heath, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Touchet 5th Baron Audley è nato il circa 1398 nel Audley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Stafford, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Ros il 24 febbraio 1414, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1408. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, nel High Heath, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Touchet 5th Baron Audleyが約1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Touchet Lord Audleyは28歳，母Elizabeth de Staffordは24歳であった。1414年2月24日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでMargaret de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年に兵役登録をした。彼は1459年9月23日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアヒグ ヒースで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアダルリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Touchet 5th Baron Audley(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Touchet Lord Audley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Stafford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1414년 2월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Margaret de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1459년 9월 23일 영국 스태퍼드실르 히 히스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더를리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Touchet 5th Baron Audley nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Stafford, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Ros em 24 de fevereiro de 1414, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1408. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, em High Heath, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Touchet 5th Baron Audley родился около 1398 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Touchet Lord Audley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Stafford, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Ros 24 февраля 1414 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1408 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 23 сентября 1459 г. в местности хаи хит, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дарли эбби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret de Ros el 24 de febrero de 1414, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1408. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, en High Heath, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Darley Abbey, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
